items: Qualtrics Experience Agents expanding: now intercept friction in-survey, guide customers, save sales, deliver personalised recovery to high-value segments. These are advisory tasks.
1/3 of Qualtrics customer base upgraded to AI capabilities within one year of launch. Momentum accelerating through expanded Experience Agents access.
New CX automation tools (March 2026): omnichannel listening, automated text analytics, AI-powered agents responding to issues in real time.
Synthetic panels going international: Qualtrics extending synthetic panel capabilities to UK, Ireland, Canada, Australia, NZ in H1 2026.
